summary: Thin, high‑end recording lacking bass makes this show hard to enjoy
review: The sole review criticizes the audio for being overly bright and missing low frequencies, resulting in a thin mix that masks much of the band’s sound. No musical performance details are given, so listeners have little guidance on the actual show beyond the poor recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star (2) review focusing on serious recording issues; no positive comments about performance to offset the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recording is described as 'very high-end' with missing bass, resulting in a thin, overly bright sound.
